content.en:
The Void Void Technique is a powerful Divine Power in the top 100 Chaos Divine Powers, and it is an incomparably weird tracking Chaos Divine Power.

There is a rumor in the chaos that no one can provoke the strong man who has cultivated the Infinite Void Technique.

After all, if you offend some true monarchs and true ancestors, there is still hope to escape, but if you offend a strong person who has practiced the art of infallibility, if you don't have a backing background, then you are basically waiting for death.

Once you have been hit by the Void Void Technique, it will be difficult to avoid the enemy's tracking, and you won't even know that you have been hit by the Void Void Technique.

This is what makes the Infinite Void Technique the most terrifying tracking power.

Peng Yu Tianjun looked at Ye Tian deeply, very shocked in his heart, and a little afraid.

Fortunately, Ye Tian is the Daoist of the Void Heaven lineage, and his relationship with Ye Tian is not bad, he is not an enemy, otherwise he would not know when he dies.

"Daozi, if you really practice the Infinite Void Life Technique, once you draw out the enemy, you can indeed easily find the enemy's location!" Peng Yu Tianjun said.

"Senior Brother Pengyu, I hope you don't leak this matter, otherwise you won't be able to lure out the enemy!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Understood!"

Peng Yu Tianjun responded.

Although his strength is stronger than Ye Tian, Ye Tian is a Heavenly Monarch-level Daozi, his status is much higher than him, and he can even order him, so he naturally will not go against Ye Tian.

Besides, Ye Tian was able to reveal the truth of this matter to him, and he also believed him.

"Daozi, if there is any trouble, please inform me as soon as possible, even if I am not the enemy's opponent, and Senior Brother Swallowing Moon is in the Void Heaven Temple, he will definitely make a move at that time!"

Peng Yu Tianjun hurriedly said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Although Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch is currently only in the top 100 Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List, his strength is also extremely strong, and there are not many Heavenly Monarchs who can threaten him, and the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch of the Void Heaven Temple is among the top few Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List, no matter how powerful, he is not afraid of any Heavenly Monarch.

With their help, Ye Tian is not afraid of any force.

But Ye Tian was not ready to ask them to make a move, after all, this was his business, and Ye Tian was confident that he would not be killed by the Heavenly Monarch, and he was only tracking the whereabouts of the enemy, and he did not need to kill all the enemies this time.

With his means, his tracking and concealment abilities are much stronger than Peng Yu Tianjun, and if Peng Yu Tianjun and the others join in, it will destroy his plan.

The Heavenly Fire Sect on the other side of the universe.

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch gathered together again to discuss Ye Tian's affairs.

"Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch, the last time the Dark God Society assassinated Wanfa Daozi failed, and he also told us to temporarily cancel the plan to assassinate Wanfa Daozi, saying that Wanfa Daozi is not easy to kill, and his life-saving ability is too strong, hum, it's ridiculous!"

"It seems that the Dark God Society is unreliable!" Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch frowned, "With the ability of the Dark God Society, the assassination should not fail, I estimate that the assassination failed once, and they didn't dare to assassinate again, for fear of being discovered, which would affect them." The dark gods will not be reliable, we must rely on ourselves. Besides, the Dark God will be very shameless, in case the Void Heaven Temple buys information from the Dark God Society, the Dark God Society will really sell us! Although the Dark God Society does not know our identity, it is not without a trace, and if it really costs a huge price, we will really be found. "

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch also knew that the Dark God would be unreliable, this force was a moth in the chaos, and he could do anything shameless, and he had no credibility at all.

But the dark gods will be very bold, dare to do anything, as long as they pay the price, they will dare to assassinate anyone, dare to trade any treasure.

Therefore, there are many forces and strong people who have found the Dark God Society.

"Blazing Sun, the Dark God will be unreliable, we must rely on ourselves, in case one day things are revealed, the Void Sky will not let us go. And that True Ancestor is also urging, he has given a lot of things, we have not achieved anything so far, this matter is unreasonable!"

"Yes! If we anger the True Ancestor behind us again, we will be finished! Therefore, we must take action against Wanfa Daozi, and I heard that Wanfa Daozi has obtained the Longling Jade Vein, if it is true, we will send it this time!"

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch was quite excited.

After the two of them combined, they still decided to make a move on Ye Tian, and they did it in person.

However, the two of them must hide their identities so as not to be discovered.

Many treasures in the chaos can change the breath, and even the soul breath, even if they make a move, the enemy does not know the identity.

But from the moves and attack methods, you can still deduce the identity of the enemy, which is the only drawback.

But the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch felt that their strength was very strong, and it was very easy to kill Ye Tian, the son of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao, and they didn't even need any trick secret skills, they could bombard Ye Tian by using ordinary great divine powers, and their identities would hardly be exposed.

Immediately, the two began to secretly collect and buy treasures that could hide the breath of the soul.

Not long after, they paid a huge price and really collected two soul-type Chaos Arcana, which could cover the soul aura of change.

Then, they secretly rushed to the area where the Void Heaven Hall was located, waiting for Ye Tian to appear.

Time passed year by year, and the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch gradually became anxious, for fear that Ye Tian would be in retreat for hundreds of millions of years at a time, and the assassination plan would be completely suspended.

Fortunately, on this day, Ye Tian finally came out of the Void Heaven Palace.

A starry sky.

Ye Tian appeared here, and suddenly the starry sky transformed, and two Chaos Treasures that sealed the void were suppressed.

Abrupt.

Feathers appeared in the void, and each feather contained a terrifying killing intent.

Great Divine Power - Feathering Three Thousand!

Then, a round of the Great Sun soared into the air and bombarded Ye Tian, and it was another great divine power - Great Sun Divine Heaven!

These two great supernatural powers are not very famous, it should be said that they are quite ordinary, but the strength of the person who shot is too strong, so the power of just the two great supernatural powers is second only to the full force of the previous Black Tower Heavenly Monarch.

......

"Sure enough, I made a move!"

Ye Tian had expected it and did not panic at all.

A series of methods such as the Great Immortal Technique and the Blood River Immortal Technique were unleashed, and no matter how many Heavenly Monarchs of the Heavenly Fire Sect attacked, they could not annihilate him.

"It's not good, the Great Immortal Technique, the Blood River Immortal Technique, the damn Dark God Society, didn't even tell us this information!!"

While the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch was panicked, he was also extremely angry.

The Dark God Society only said that Ye Tian had strong means of saving his life, and he thought that Ye Tian was using the life-saving thing of the Dao Ancestor, but he didn't expect to rely on his own strength.

If they knew that Ye Tianhui's limit-level Great Immortal Technique and the Blood River Immortal Technique at the peak of the entry, they would not have come to assassinate like this.

"If you can't kill the Ten Thousand Laws, retreat!"

The Scorching Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch were very sure and were about to flee immediately.

Then.

Ye Tian secretly made a move, and the Ten Thousand Void Life Technique was unleashed, turning into two invisible marks and falling on the bodies of the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch.
